source: NvChad - Plugins: Project Manager: projectmgr.nvim: opening it, its keys, autogit and sessions

questions.q: Which plugin adds project management to NvChad?
questions.why: projectmgr.nvim manages projects with good Telescope integration.
Its Telescope integration makes project management functional.

questions.q: Which single command opens the project manager buffer?
In the ProjectMgr buffer, which key ADDS a project interactively?
questions.why: Ctrl+a starts the interactive add procedure.

questions.q: Which keys edit and delete a project?
questions.why: Ctrl+e edits, Ctrl+d deletes; Ctrl+q closes the buffer.

questions.q: Startup/Exit commands for a project are entered...
options: as editor commands WITHOUT the leading colon (e.g. NvimTreeToggle), not bash
questions.why: They are editor commands, entered without the colon.

questions.q: When enabled, the autogit feature runs on project open...
options: git pull --ff-only (fast-forward-only sync, logged to a file)
questions.why: It fast-forwards the repo and logs to .git/fastforward.log.

questions.q: The session feature (session = { enabled = true, ... }) does what?
options: Saves the editor session so you reopen the files you were working on
questions.why: It stores editor state; the guide writes Session.vim into .git.

questions.q: Which command checks whether open buffers were changed outside NvChad?
questions.why: :checktime warns when files were modified outside the editor.
